Subscriber.title: Subscriber
Subscriber.description: A user who has subscribed to the newsletter using their Google account.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user.

email.description: The email address of the subscriber.

displayName.description: The display name of the subscriber.

subscribedAt.description: The timestamp when the user subscribed.

NewsletterEmail.title: NewsletterEmail
NewsletterEmail.description: An email address submitted via the footer newsletter form.

email.description: The email address of the subscriber.

subscribedAt.description: The timestamp when the email was submitted.

/newsletter_emails/{emailId}.description: Collection of emails submitted via the footer.
